message:
bd-ml2r.7.1: add directed algorithm surface for Phase-2 FNX integration

Implements minimum directed algorithm APIs with deterministic output:
- SCC (Tarjan's algorithm) with self-loop detection
- WCC (BFS) with undirected connectivity
- Directed cycle detection with node/edge tracking
- Reachability analysis with source/sink identification

All outputs sorted deterministically for reproducible layout decisions.
19 tests covering core algorithms plus edge cases (isolated nodes,
self-loops, determinism verification).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
